description.p: Wtop is a lightweight, real-time system monitor built with Rust that streams live metrics to your browser. Monitor CPU, GPU, memory, network, disk I/O, filesystems, and processes from any device on your network.

ul.li: Per-core CPU usage, frequency, and temperature
Real CPU power via RAPL when available
Interactive process table with filtering and pinning
6 color themes including Catppuccin, Dracula, Nord, and Gruvbox
6 languages: English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Chinese
Installable as a PWA on mobile devices

description.p: Phase 1-5: Security, modular architecture, advanced metrics, accessibility, themes, PWA, and packaging.
